findings.title: arc53/llm-price-compass
findings.description: This project collects GPU benchmarks from various cloud providers and compares them to fixed per token costs. Use our tool for efficient LLM GPU selections and cost-effective AI models. LLM provider price comparison, gpu benchmarks to price per token calculation, gpu benchmark table

findings.title: MigoXLab/LMeterX
findings.description: A general-purpose API load testing platform that supports LLM services and business HTTP interfaces, enabling one-click performance testing, result comparison, and AI-powered intelligent analysis and summarization. 一站式通用 API 压测平台，支持大模型推理与业务 HTTP 接口，一键完成性能测试、结果对比与 AI 智能分析总结

findings.title: SciYu/HiPhO
findings.description: The first high school physics Olympiad benchmark for evaluating (M)LLMs with step-level grading and human-level comparison.

findings.title: ozturkoktay/insurance-llm-framework
findings.description: An interactive framework for experimenting with and evaluating open-source large language models (LLMs) for insurance-related tasks. This application provides a user-friendly interface for prompt engineering, text generation, model comparison, and benchmark creation.

findings.title: alexfazio/artificial-analysis-compare
findings.description: LLM model comparison skill using Artificial Analysis API - benchmarks, pricing, and performance metrics

findings.title: msu-denver/bili-core
findings.description: bili-core is an open-source framework for LLM benchmarking using LangChain, LangGraph, Streamlit, and Flask. It enables effective LLM model comparisons, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and customizable decision workflows. Part of MSU Denver’s Sustainability Hub, bili-core promotes data democracy and transparent, reproducible AI research. 🚀

findings.title: slinusc/bench360
findings.description: Bench360 is a modular benchmarking suite for local LLM deployments. It offers a full-stack, extensible pipeline to evaluate the latency, throughput, quality, and cost of LLM inference on consumer and enterprise GPUs. Bench360 supports flexible backends, tasks and scenarios, enabling fair and reproducible comparisons for researchers & practitioners.

findings.title: IliasAarab/btzsc
findings.description: BTZSC (Benchmark for Zero-Shot Text Classification) provides a unified framework to evaluate and compare zero-shot models across multiple architecture families: cross-encoders, embedding models, rerankers, and LLMs. It includes standardized metrics, baseline comparisons, and a simple CLI for reproducible benchmarking workflows.

findings.title: iqbalxo/AI-Evaluation-And-Benchmarking
findings.description: AI evaluation and benchmarking platform with dataset ingestion, LLM-as-a-judge scoring, run tracing observability, and cost-aware model comparison.

findings.title: git-disl/GTLLMZoo
findings.description: GTLLMZoo: A comprehensive framework that aggregates LLM benchmark data from multiple sources with an interactive UI for efficient model comparison, filtering, and evaluation across performance, safety, and efficiency metrics.

findings.title: broskees/llm-compare
findings.description: LLM benchmark comparison tool

findings.title: AnthusAI/LLM-Price-Comparison
findings.description: A comparison of the price per million tokens and benchmark scores of various large language models.

findings.title: RobinsonBeato/LLM-Failure-Atlas
findings.description: Failure-analysis platform for mapping where language models break, built around stable taxonomies, versioned prompts, deterministic scoring, auditable runs, and cross-model comparison.

findings.title: e-Nicko/CognitiveFrontier.info
findings.description: Open scientific platform exploring the parallels and distinctions between the human brain and artificial general intelligence. Features interactive comparisons, benchmarks, visualizations, and consciousness philosophy.

findings.title: nithingm/PDFXtract-Arena
findings.description: PDFXtract Arena: A powerful benchmarking framework to evaluate and compare PDF data extraction tools. It provides a standardized way to test open-source libraries, cloud APIs, and LLMs. Get detailed comparisons and accuracy scores for complex table and text extraction to find the most reliable solution for your use case.

findings.title: Lambard-ML-Team/LLM_comparison_4MS
findings.description: Performance's comparison of different LLM on a Material science benchmark

findings.title: sugihAF/DomainBench
findings.description: LLM Benchmark and Comparison on Domain Specific Implementation

findings.title: aitullalimon/creative-writing-llm-benchmark
findings.description: A Next.js–based benchmarking platform for comparing large language models on creative writing quality. Implements an LLM-as-a-judge evaluation pipeline with theme coherence scoring, persistent run history, interactive leaderboards, and visual analytics for model comparison.

findings.title: olekkut/coding-llm-benchmarks-guide
findings.description: This repository provides an extensive, in-depth comparison and benchmarking of state-of-the-art local coding Large Language Models (LLMs), evaluating their performance, accuracy, inference speed, memory requirements, supported programming languages, licensing, and practical suitability for various use cases.

findings.title: originaonxi/llm-evals-arena
findings.description: LLM evaluation arena — head-to-head model comparisons across reasoning, code, safety, and instruction following benchmarks
